title: Aesthetic Coding
text:
Learning Resources
Aesthetic Coding is done through various libraries and frameworks. I have classified the learning resources based on the tool that is used.

p5.js
The following learning resources are centred around [[p5js|p5.js]].

Books

The books are in order of my preference!


Aesthetic Programming: A Handbook of Software Studies by Winnie Soon, Geoff Cox.
Getting Started with p5.js by Lauren-McCarthy, Casey Reas, and Ben Fry. Illustrations by Taeyoon Choi.
Generative Design by Benedikt Gross, Hartmut Bohnacker, Julia Laub and Claudius Lazzeroni.
Learn JavaScript with p5.js by Engin Arslan.


References

books | p5.js




Courses

The courses are in order of my preference!


Creative Coding For Beginners by The Coding Train
How to Code Generative Art using p5.js - YouTube
Creative Coding For Complete Beginners - YouTube

title: p5.js
text:

title: Code! Programming with p5.js for beginners Trailer
text:
The person behind the-coding-train is dan-shiffman.
This course is centred around teaching the basics and fundamentals of programming with JavaScript through p5js library for complete beginners.
Things you can make after the creative-coding-for-beginners course:

Games
Art projects
Science experiments/simulations
Performances
etc.

title: What Is Aesthetic Coding
text:
Aesthetic Coding is a style of computer programming in which the goal is to create something beautiful and expressive instead of something functional.
